name: Sterling
description_short: Sterling Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering savings accounts, loans, and digital banking services to individuals and small businesses.
description_long:
Sterling Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative operating under NCUA insurance. The institution recently expanded its footprint through the acquisition of Haxtun Community Federal Credit Union, which is now operating as Haxtun Federal Credit Union, a Division of Sterling Federal Credit Union. This merger demonstrates the credit union's growth trajectory and commitment to serving expanded geographic and membership communities.

Sterling offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including share savings accounts (regular and special accounts at 1.51% APY), vehicle loans (new vehicles at 4.99% APR and used vehicles at 5.50% APR), online and mobile banking platforms, bill pay services, and business banking solutions. Members can access mobile deposit capture, fund transfers, loan payments, and account monitoring through their Sterling CU 24/7 mobile app. The credit union also provides business-focused tools including AutoBooks for invoicing and payment acceptance, and a Business Debit Rewards Program.

Key differentiators include fee-free bill pay services integrated into online and mobile banking, mobile wallet functionality for Visa debit cards, and member-exclusive programs like the Secret Savers Summer Event offering prizes for regular deposits. The institution maintains 24/7 digital banking access and offers secure messaging with staff. Their focus on both personal and small business banking, combined with competitive loan rates and no-fee digital services, sets them apart from traditional banks.

As a credit union, Sterling prioritizes member benefits over shareholder profits, which typically results in competitive rates and lower fees. However, membership eligibility requirements and limited branch networks compared to large banks may restrict accessibility for some consumers. The recent merger integration may also affect service availability during transition periods at affected branches.
services: Share savings accounts (regular and special accounts)
Online banking with account viewing, fund transfers, and loan payment capabilities
Mobile banking app (Sterling CU 24/7) with mobile deposit capture
Bill pay service (no fees, supports person-to-person and business payments)
Mobile wallet functionality for Visa debit cards
AutoBooks for small business invoicing and payment acceptance
Secure member messaging with credit union staff
Debit card management and activation features
pros: Competitive auto loan rates: 4.99% APR for new vehicles and 5.50% for used vehicles
Fee-free bill pay service included with online and mobile banking accounts
Mobile deposit capture functionality available through Sterling CU 24/7 app
Member-exclusive promotions like Secret Savers Summer Event with tangible rewards
No-fee digital banking services including online banking, mobile banking, and secure messaging
Business-focused tools including AutoBooks for small business invoicing and payments
24/7 digital banking access through mobile app with touch/face recognition security options
Expanding service network through strategic mergers (recent Haxtun acquisition)
cons: Savings rates at 1.51% APY are modest compared to online banks and high-yield savings alternatives
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements and enrollment process on homepage
Merger integration with Haxtun branch may create service disruptions or limitations during transition period
No mention of overdraft protection, ATM network partnerships, or availability details for account holders
Limited branch locations compared to national banks, restricting in-person service accessibility for some members
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto loan rates with straightforward digital banking
Small business owners needing invoicing tools and business debit card rewards programs
Individuals prioritizing fee-free digital services and 24/7 mobile banking access
Community-focused members in Sterling's service area who value credit union principles and member benefits
diagnosis: Sterling Federal Credit Union is best for community members and small business owners seeking member-owned financial institutions with competitive loan rates and fee-free digital services. The main caveat is that savings rates remain modest, and membership eligibility may be restricted to specific geographic areas or employment groups, so prospective members should verify eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Sterling — Credit Union in STERLING, CO | CreditDoc
meta_description: Sterling — NCUA-insured credit union in STERLING, CO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
